documentation.description:
CBOR (RFC 8949) encoding/decoding library for Ada/SPARK.

This package provides core types for CBOR data items. The encoder
(CBOR.Encoding) is fully SPARK-proved (no runtime Errors possible).
The decoder (CBOR.Decoding) validates well-formedness per RFC 8949
including shortest-form checking, reserved AI rejection, string
length bounds, and nested depth limits.

Limitations:
  - Float values are encoded/decoded as opaque byte arrays
  - No half-precision float conversion (Layer 2)
  - UTF-8 validation is optional (Check_UTF8 parameter)
  - Decode_All limits items to Max_Decode_Items (128)
  - Max nesting depth is Max_Nesting_Depth (16)

simple_types.name: Decode_Status
simple_types.code:
type Decode_Status is
  (OK,
   Err_Not_Well_Formed,
   Err_Truncated,
   Err_Trailing_Data,
   Err_Depth_Exceeded,
   Err_Invalid_UTF8,
   Err_Too_Many_Items,
   Err_String_Too_Long,
   Err_Resource_Limit);

simple_types.name: Major_Type
simple_types.code:
type Major_Type is
  (MT_Unsigned_Integer,
   MT_Negative_Integer,
   MT_Byte_String,
   MT_Text_String,
   MT_Array,
   MT_Map,
   MT_Tag,
   MT_Simple_Value);

array_types.name: Item_Array
array_types.code: type Item_Array is array (Item_Range) of CBOR_Item;

record_types.name: CBOR_Item
Decode_All_Result
Decode_Result
String_Ref

subtypes.name: Item_Range
subtypes.code: subtype Item_Range is Item_Count range 1 .. Max_Decode_Items;

subtypes.name: SE_Length
subtypes.code: subtype SE_Length is SE_Offset range 0 .. SE_Offset'Last;
